guest: Shell (EPICDESI / Sheil), Founder of domain auction platform for ICANN new TLDs

business_ideas.idea: Ascending clock auction platform for contested domain name auctions
Apple-compatible headphones in iPod mini colors (early side business)
Real estate rental properties targeting below-market value four-unit multifamily
Options trading on internet company stocks using Google Trends data

predictions.text: New generic top-level domains will generate hundreds of millions in recurring revenue
Auction mechanism design will become critical infrastructure for internet commerce

dynamics: Shell drives with auction theory expertise and diverse entrepreneurial experience. Sam riffs on real estate and negotiation angles. High rapport as Shell shares diverse explorations from headphones to India travel.
frameworks: Ascending clock second-price auction mechanism (incentive-compatible bidding)
Multi-unit residential property strategy under 4-unit threshold
learnings: Credibility with domain buyers required year-long relationship building, not immediate expertise claims
Founder persistence through conferences and cold outreach eventually builds necessary relationships
Real estate wealth-building through leverage available to young operators with moderate capital

banger_quotes.quote: Bought a pack of cigarettes I don't smoke to talk to this guy
This is the closest to like CIA operatives going undercover for heroin

numbers_dropped: First house purchased at age 22 for $47K in Pittsburgh
8 initial domains auctioned, dot.photography went for ~$3M
notable: Shell met co-founder on 40-hour India train ride in 2006; bought early internet real estate (Pittsburgh 2004) before moving to Bay Area.
